case_title: ESBF CALIFORNIA, LLC VS. LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESBF CALIFORNIA, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. ZHANG, CATHERINE $108,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,420.00 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $114,270.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
